name: Dual Zoren
description: Short axes held in each hand. High attack speed and can hit multiple targets. Delivers a high percentage of critical strikes.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.description: Short axes held in each hand. High attack speed and can hit multiple targets. Delivers a high percentage of critical strikes.

components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

components.name: Salvage

High value metals collected from war salvage.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.10.0
patchlogs.fixes:
This update gives the toxic Saryn a lot of love with a brand-new deluxe skin, Sugatra, and a weapon skin that puts a floral touch on the deadly Dual Zoren.  These skins will only be for a limited time, and will be removed from the Market on November 18, at 2 p.m EST.
Get the Saryn Orphid Skin, Melia Sugatra, and Cyskis Dual Zoren Skin by visiting the Market today!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed melee action being temporarily blocked after completing a slide attack with Dual Zorens.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.2 Hot-Fixes
patchlogs.fixes: fixed issues with Dual Zoren's responsiveness when speed mods are equipped

patchlogs.name: Update 6.4 Hotfixes
patchlogs.changes: "Dagger Axe" skins added to the Market for Scindo and Dual Zoren.

patchlogs.name: Update 6: Hotfix 6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Dual Zoren balancing: Increased critical chance and increased critical damage.

patchlogs.name: Update 6 - "New Stompin’ Grounds"
patchlogs.additions: New weapons: Dual Zoren, Akbolto, and Boltor!
